promoted_facts.fact: All entity assets and franchise contracts are pledged as collateral for Hilton parent debt maturing 2025-2033
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Not in reader report — discovered in financial notes depth pass (Note 7)

promoted_facts.fact: Entity is treated as a disregarded entity for US income tax purposes — no US income tax provision
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Not explicitly stated in reader report

promoted_facts.fact: Graduate brand franchise contracts acquired May 2024 for ~$85M, 15-year amortization
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Not in reader report — discovered in financial notes depth pass (Note 3)

promoted_facts.fact: Contract acquisition costs (incentives to hotel owners) totaling $376M gross are amortized as reduction of royalty fees
Operator agreement with Hilton affiliate exists, entitling affiliate to reasonable fee, but no compensation paid in 2022-2024
Franchise deposits collected by Hilton affiliates into lockbox account to which entity has no access
Subsequent events note contains apparent date typo — reads 'March 18, 2024' but should be March 18, 2025
HSM late payment interest rate is 18.5% per year, compounded daily
